raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "describing a behavioral outcome under a specific condition",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the person will be in bed regardless of effort",
    "lying quietly is the default state without active sleep effort",
    "no other behaviors (e.g., restlessness) will occur"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a conditional but counterintuitive, as effort to sleep is typically what leads to lying in bed",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "accurate description of an observed individual pattern in a relevant context like psychology or sleep studies",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the actual behavior differs from quiet lying, or the statement is applied as a general rule rather than a specific case"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: describing a behavioral outcome under a specific condition
implicit_claims: the person will be in bed regardless of effort
lying quietly is the default state without active sleep effort
no other behaviors (e.g., restlessness) will occur
